word: H7802 - שׁוּשַׁן עֵדוּת - Shûwshan ʻÊdûwth - shoo-shan' ay-dooth' - Shoshannim-Eduth

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁושׁנּים עדוּת שׁוּשׁן עדוּת

Transliteration: shûshan ‛êdûth shôshannı̂ym ‛êdûth

Phonetic: shoo-shan' ay-dooth'

BDB Definition:

Shoshannim-eduth or Shushan-eduth = "lilies"
  1. instruction in the title of Psa 60:1-12 and Psalm 80
    1. meaning uncertain

Origin: from H7799 and H5715

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
